001package edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.service.respository;
002
003import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.dao.FossilDao;
004import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.Fossil;
005import jakarta.inject.Inject;
006import java.util.Collection;
007import java.util.List;
008import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture;
009
010/**
011 * Implementation of {@link FossilRepository} that delegates to the corresponding DAO for database
012 * operations.
013 */
014public class FossilRepositoryImpl implements FossilRepository {
015
016  private final FossilDao fossilDao;
017
018  /**
019   * Constructs a FossilRepositoryImpl with the specified DAO.
020   *
021   * @param fossilDao DAO for database operations.
022   */
023  @Inject
024  FossilRepositoryImpl(FossilDao fossilDao) {
025    this.fossilDao = fossilDao;
026  }
027
028  @Override
029  public CompletableFuture<List<Fossil>> getUnassignedFossils(int limit) {
030    return CompletableFuture.supplyAsync(() -> fossilDao.selectRandomUnassigned(limit));
031  }
032
033  @Override
034  public CompletableFuture<Fossil> getById(long id) {
035    return CompletableFuture.supplyAsync(() -> fossilDao.selectById(id));
036  }
037
038  @Override
039  public CompletableFuture<Boolean> batchInsert(Collection<Fossil> fossils) {
040    return CompletableFuture.supplyAsync(() -> {
041      try {
042        fossilDao.insert(fossils);
043        return true;
044      } catch (Exception e) {
045        return false;
046      }
047    });
048  }
049}
